feats.description: Increase one ability score by 2 or two ability scores by 1 (max 20).
Gain aid from temples and clergy of your faith: lodging, healing, and local knowledge.
You have a reliable and trustworthy contact in the criminal underworld.
Common folk shelter and hide you; they won't report you to authorities.
Your noble bearing opens doors to high society and commands deference from commoners.
When you fail to recall lore, you know where to find it in a library or from a sage.
Your military rank grants authority over soldiers and access to military resources.
Enter a battle rage: advantage on STR checks, bonus damage, resistance to physical damage.
Without armor, AC equals 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier.
Attack with advantage on the first attack, but attackers have advantage on attacks against you until next turn.
Advantage on DEX saves against visible effects while not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.
Choose a Primal Path subclass that shapes the nature of your rage.
Gain proficiency in one additional skill from the Barbarian skill list.
Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Speed increases by 10 ft while not wearing heavy armor.
Advantage on initiative rolls; can enter rage to act first when surprised.
Roll one additional weapon damage die on a melee critical hit.
Roll two additional weapon damage dice on a melee critical hit.
Roll three additional weapon damage dice on a melee critical hit.
When reduced to 0 HP while raging, make a DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead.
Rage only ends early if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.
STR and CON each increase by 4 (may exceed 20).
Cast bard spells using CHA as your spellcasting ability.
Grant an ally a d6 Bardic Inspiration die to add to one ability check, attack, or save.
Add half proficiency bonus to ability checks not using proficiency.
Allies regain an extra d6 HP when spending Hit Dice during a short rest.
Choose a Bard College subclass that grants additional features.
Double proficiency bonus for two chosen skills or tools.
Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d8.
Regain all uses of Bardic Inspiration at the end of a short or long rest.
Use your action to give allies within 30 ft advantage on saves against charmed or frightened.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Bard College subclass.
Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d10.
Learn 2 spells from any class's spell list.
Your Song of Rest die becomes a d8.
Your Song of Rest die becomes a d10.
Learn 2 more spells from any class's spell list.
Your Bardic Inspiration die becomes a d12.
Learn 2 more spells from any class's spell list.
Your Song of Rest die becomes a d12.
If you have no Bardic Inspiration dice when rolling initiative, regain one use.
Cast cleric spells using WIS as your spellcasting ability.
Choose a Divine Domain subclass granting domain spells and features.
Channel divine energy once per short/long rest to fuel special effects.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Divine Domain subclass.
Use Channel Divinity twice per short/long rest.
Undead of CR 1/2 or lower are destroyed on a failed Turn Undead save.
Use Channel Divinity three times per short/long rest.
Undead of CR 1 or lower are destroyed on a failed Turn Undead save.
Call on your deity for aid; chance equal to cleric level of success.
Undead of CR 2 or lower are destroyed on a failed Turn Undead save.
Undead of CR 3 or lower are destroyed on a failed Turn Undead save.
Undead of CR 4 or lower are destroyed on a failed Turn Undead save.
Use Channel Divinity an unlimited number of times; no need to rest between uses.
Your deity's intervention now succeeds automatically.
Know Druidic, a secret language only druids know; can leave hidden messages.
Cast druid spells using WIS as your spellcasting ability.
Magically transform into beasts you have seen; limited by CR and movement types.
Choose a Druid Circle subclass that grants additional features.
Wild Shape allows beasts of up to CR 1/2 with a flying speed.
Wild Shape allows beasts of up to CR 1 with any movement type.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Druid Circle subclass.
Move through nonmagical difficult terrain without penalty; advantage on saves from magical plants.
Age ten times slower; no longer need food or water.
Cast druid spells in Wild Shape form, as long as they have no material components.
Unlimited uses of Wild Shape; ignore verbal and somatic components while transformed.
Adopt a fighting style specialty: Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, or Two-Weapon.
Bonus action to regain 1d10 + fighter level HP once per short or long rest.
Take one additional action on your turn once per short or long rest.
Choose a Martial Archetype subclass that grants additional combat features.
Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Martial Archetype subclass.
Reroll a failed saving throw once per long rest.
Attack three times instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Reroll failed saving throws up to twice per long rest.
Use Action Surge twice before a rest.
Reroll failed saving throws up to three times per long rest.
Attack four times instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Without armor or shield, AC equals 10 + DEX modifier + WIS modifier.
Use DEX for unarmed strikes and monk weapons; deal 1d4 unarmed damage; bonus unarmed strike.
Spend ki points to fuel special monk abilities like Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind.
Speed increases by 10 ft while not wearing armor or wielding a shield.
Choose a Monastic Tradition subclass that grants additional features.
Reduce ranged weapon damage by 1d10 + DEX + monk level; catch and throw it back if damage is reduced to 0.
Reduce falling damage by 5 times monk level.
Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Spend 1 ki after hitting; target must make CON save or be stunned until end of your next turn.
Unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Monastic Tradition subclass.
Speed increases by 15 ft while not wearing armor or wielding a shield.
On a successful DEX save against an area effect, take no damage; half damage on failure.
Use your action to end one charmed or frightened condition on yourself.
Immune to disease and poison.

feats.displayName: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
feats.description: Understand all spoken languages and all creatures can understand your speech.
Proficiency in all saving throws; spend 1 ki to reroll a failed save.
No longer suffer penalties from aging; cannot be magically aged.
Spend 4 ki to become invisible for 1 minute with resistance to all damage except force.
When you roll initiative with no ki points, regain 4 ki points.
Detect celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 ft; sense holy or unhallowed sites.
Pool of healing equal to 5 × paladin level to restore HP or cure disease and poison.
Adopt a paladin fighting style: Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, or Protection.
Cast paladin spells using CHA as your spellcasting ability.
Expend a spell slot on a hit to deal radiant damage: 2d8 + 1d8 per slot level above 1st.
Immune to disease.
Take an oath and choose a Sacred Oath subclass granting oath spells and features.
Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Allies within 10 ft add CHA modifier (min 1) to all saving throws.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Sacred Oath subclass.
Allies within 10 ft can't be frightened while you are conscious.
Melee weapon attacks deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.
Use action to end one spell on a willing creature; uses equal CHA modifier per long rest.
Aura of Protection and Aura of Courage extend to 30 ft.
Choose a favored enemy type; advantage on tracking and recalling information about them.
Choose a favored terrain; double proficiency on INT/WIS checks related to it, and travel benefits.
Adopt a ranger fighting style: Archery, Defense, Dueling, or Two-Weapon Fighting.
Cast ranger spells using WIS as your spellcasting ability.
Choose a Ranger Archetype subclass that grants additional features.
Expend a spell slot to sense favored enemies within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain).
Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.
Add another favored enemy type and one associated language.
Add another favored terrain type.
Spend 1 minute applying natural camouflage; +10 bonus to Stealth while motionless.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Ranger Archetype subclass.
Use Hide as a bonus action; can't be tracked by nonmagical means unless you choose to leave a trail.
No disadvantage against invisible creatures; detect hidden creatures within 30 ft while not blinded.
Once per turn, add WIS modifier to attack or damage roll against a favored enemy.
Double proficiency bonus for two chosen skills or tools.
Deal an extra 1d6 damage when hitting an off-guard target with a finesse or ranged weapon.
Know the secret mix of jargon, slang, and code used by rogues to pass hidden messages.
Use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 2d6.
Choose a Roguish Archetype subclass that grants additional features.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 3d6.
Use reaction to halve the damage of an attack that hits you and that you can see.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 4d6.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 5d6.
On a successful DEX save against an area effect, take no damage; half damage on failure.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 6d6.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Roguish Archetype subclass.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 7d6.
Treat any roll of 9 or less as 10 on ability checks using proficiency.
Aware of hidden and invisible creatures within 10 ft.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 8d6.
Gain proficiency in WIS saving throws.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 9d6.
No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.
Sneak Attack damage increases to 10d6.
If your attack misses, treat it as a hit; or if you fail an ability check, treat the d20 roll as 20.
Cast sorcerer spells using CHA as your spellcasting ability.
Choose a Sorcerous Origin subclass that shapes your innate magic.
Gain sorcery points equal to sorcerer level; convert slots to/from sorcery points.
Choose two Metamagic options to alter your spells using sorcery points.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Sorcerous Origin subclass.
Learn one additional Metamagic option.
Regain 4 expended sorcery points on a short rest.
Choose a patron and a Warlock subclass that grants expanded spells and features.
Cast warlock spells using CHA; regain all slots on a short or long rest.
Learn 2 Eldritch Invocations that grant special abilities.
Choose a Pact Boon: Pact of the Chain, Pact of the Blade, or Pact of the Tome.
Learn one additional Eldritch Invocation or replace one you know.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Otherworldly Patron subclass.
Choose a 6th-level warlock spell to cast once per long rest without a spell slot.
Choose a 7th-level warlock spell to cast once per long rest without a spell slot.
Choose an 8th-level warlock spell to cast once per long rest without a spell slot.
Choose a 9th-level warlock spell to cast once per long rest without a spell slot.
Spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended pact magic slots once per long rest.
Cast wizard spells using INT as your spellcasting ability; copy spells into a spellbook.
Once per day after a short rest, recover spell slots totaling up to half wizard level (rounded up).
Choose an Arcane Tradition subclass (school of magic) that grants additional features.
Gain an additional feature from your chosen Arcane Tradition subclass.
Choose a 1st- and 2nd-level spell; cast them at their lowest level without a slot.
Choose two 3rd-level wizard spells as signature spells; always prepared and castable for free once each per short rest.
+5 bonus to initiative; can't be surprised; hidden creatures don't gain advantage on attacks against you.
+1 STR or DEX; stand from prone costs only 5 ft; climb without penalty; running long jump from 5 ft.
+1 CHA; advantage on Deception/Performance to pass as someone else; mimic sounds and voices.
After Dashing, make one bonus attack (+5 damage) or shove a creature.
Ignore loading; no disadvantage at melee range; bonus bolt after attacking with a one-handed weapon.
Reaction: add proficiency bonus to AC against one melee attack when wielding a finesse weapon.
+1 AC while dual-wielding; use non-light weapons for two-weapon fighting; draw two weapons at once.
Advantage on detecting secret doors and traps; resistance to trap damage; Search for traps at normal pace.
+1 CON; when spending Hit Dice on a short rest, minimum roll equals twice your CON modifier.
Spells ignore resistance to a chosen damage type; treat 1s as 2s on damage dice for that type.
Advantage on attacks against grappled creatures; use action to pin a grappled creature, restraining both.
On critical hit or kill, bonus attack; trade -5 to hit for +10 damage with heavy weapons.
Stabilize with a healer's kit; use a kit to restore 1d6 + 4 + max HD hp once per short rest.
+1 STR; gain proficiency with heavy armor.
+1 STR; while in heavy armor, reduce bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from non-magical attacks by 3.
Spend 10 minutes inspiring up to 6 allies; each gains temp HP equal to your level + CHA modifier.
+1 INT; always know north, hours until sunrise/sunset, and recall anything from the past 30 days.
+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with light armor.
+1 INT; learn 3 languages; create written ciphers that require successful INT check to decode.
3 luck points per long rest to reroll attack, ability check, or save—or force an enemy reroll.
Reaction attack when a creature within 5 ft casts a spell; that creature has disadvantage on concentration.
Learn 2 cantrips and one 1st-level spell from a chosen class list, cast the spell once per long rest.
Learn 2 Battle Master maneuvers and gain 1 superiority die (d6).
No disadvantage on Stealth in medium armor; DEX bonus to AC in medium armor increases to +3.
+10 ft speed; Dash through difficult terrain without penalty; no opportunity attacks when you move from a target.
+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.
Advantage on melee attacks against smaller unmounted creatures; redirect attacks from mount to you.
+1 INT or WIS; read lips; +5 bonus to passive Perception and passive Investigation.
Bonus attack with butt end of a polearm; opportunity attacks when enemies enter your reach.
+1 to chosen ability score; gain proficiency in that ability's saving throw.
Acquire a ritual book with 2 rituals from a chosen class; copy more ritual spells found.
Once per turn, reroll a melee weapon attack's damage dice and use either result.
Opportunity attacks reduce speed to 0; attack even when enemy Disengages; react to attacks on allies.
No disadvantage at long range; ignore half/three-quarters cover; trade -5 attack for +10 damage.
Bonus action shove after attacking; add shield bonus to DEX saves against targeted spells.
Gain proficiency in any combination of 3 skills or tools of your choice.
Hide when lightly obscured; missed attacks don't reveal position; no disadvantage in dim light.
Double the range of attack cantrips; ignore half/three-quarters cover; learn 1 attack cantrip.
+1 STR or CON; proficient with improvised weapons; unarmed strike deals 1d4; bonus grapple after unarmed hit.
HP maximum increases by 2 per character level (and 2 per future level gained).
Advantage on concentration saves; cast with weapons in hands; cast a spell as opportunity attack.
+1 STR or DEX; gain proficiency with 4 weapons of your choice.
